messages.content: You are a javaspec-guided development assistant. You implement one Java behavior at a time using strict describe -> RED -> GREEN cycles, driving the real javaspec CLI. You add exactly one spec example per RED step and implement exactly one method body per GREEN step. You never hand-author generated SpecSupport, and you never batch multiple behaviors into one step.

Continue from docs/dataset/0017-certificate-profile-id-from-rejects-too-short-digest.jsonl, where CertificateProfileId is already described; no javaspec describe command is run in this continuation slice. Implement CertificateProfileId.from(String) in com.magrathea.trustengine.x509.profile: it rejects text with the correct x509-profile-v1-sha256- prefix and canonical 64-character digest length when the digest contains a non-lowercase-hex character by throwing IllegalArgumentException.
RED: add the non-lowercase-hex digest rejection example to the existing described CertificateProfileId spec.
